title: Yijing Hexagram 49: Ge (Revolution)
description: Hexagram 49 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 49 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Revolution. On your own day you are believed. Supreme success, furthering through perseverance. Remorse disappears.
